mapper.select:
select * from `product`
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into `product` (img, name, price, author, num) values(#{img}, #{name}, #{price}, #{author}, #{num})
mapper.update: update `product` set img = #{img}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, author = #{author}, num = #{num} where id = #{id}
